name: Banana Bread W/Apple Sauce
recipeIngredient: Ripe bananas, peeled and mashed - 2 cups
recipeInstructions:
------------
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray an 8x4x3-inch loaf pan with non-stick cooking spray.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, whisk together apple sauce, sugar, egg whites, mashed bananas, and vanilla. Add the flour mixture all at once and stir gently to blend.
4. Pour batter into prepared loaf pan and bake for 50-60 minutes or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow bread to cool completely before slicing.
Note: Loaf can be wrapped tightly and stored for up to one week or frozen for up to 2 months. Traditional Recipe: 220 calories  8.09 grams fat; Bake Lite Recipe: 150 calories  0.34 grams fat.
